recommendations.title: Dillinger Is Dead
recommendations.overview: A man decides to cook for himself and finds a revolver (which may have belonged to John Dillinger) hidden in his kitchen.

recommendations.title: Branded to Kill
recommendations.overview: After botching his latest assignment, a third-ranked Japanese hit man becomes the target of another assassin.

recommendations.title: El Gringo
recommendations.overview: A man crossing into Mexico with a satchel of $2,000,000—and a bloody past—finds himself under sudden attack in the sleepy town of El Fronteras.

recommendations.title: Violet & Daisy
recommendations.overview: Two teenage assassins accept what they think will be a quick-and-easy job, until an unexpected target throws them off their plan.

recommendations.title: Fire with Fire
recommendations.overview: A fireman takes an unexpected course of action when a man whom he's been ordered to testify against—after being held up at a local convenience store—threatens him.

recommendations.title: September 5
recommendations.overview: During the 1972 Munich Olympics, an American sports broadcasting crew finds itself thrust into covering the hostage crisis involving Israeli athletes.

recommendations.title: Accident Man: Hitman's Holiday
recommendations.overview: The Accident Man is back, and this time he must best the top assassins in the world to protect the ungrateful son of a mafia boss, save the life of his only friend and rekindle his relationship with his maniacal father figure.

recommendations.title: London Calling
recommendations.overview: After fleeing the UK from a job gone wrong, a down on his luck hitman is forced to babysit the son of his new crime boss and show him how to become a man.

recommendations.title: The Big 4
recommendations.overview: A by-the-book female detective teams up with four down-on-their-luck assassins to investigate her father's murder.

recommendations.title: The Big Hit
recommendations.overview: Affable hit man Melvin Smiley is constantly being scammed by his cutthroat colleagues in the life-ending business. So, when he and his fellow assassins kidnap the daughter of an electronics mogul, it's naturally Melvin who takes the fall when their p
